name: Briami
recipeIngredient: 3-4 medium potatoes, cut into similar cubes
2 eggplants (the purple, zucchini look-alike), cut into cubes
1/2 cup oil (preferably olive, but any kind will do)
a dash of nutmeg and thyme
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the zucchini cubes, potatoes, eggplants, stewed tomatoes, garlic, onion, bay leaves, oil, nutmeg, thyme, salt, and pepper in your baking pan.
2. Mix all the ingredients thoroughly to ensure they are well combined (another name for this dish is Tourlou).
3. Bake at a medium heat oven for about 1 hour.
4. If needed, add a touch of water to prevent the mixture from burning.
5. Allow to cool before serving.
6. Serve with a generous amount of oil and juices, and with some bread to clean up the plate!
